yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_PX4_Autopilot {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for PX4 Autopilot"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-31"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-APT-22" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Anritsu_Remote_Spectrum_Monitor {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Anritsu Remote Spectrum Monitor"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-31"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-APT-22" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_TrueConf_ZeroDay_Exploited_in_Attacks_on {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for TrueConf Zero-Day Exploited in Attacks on Southeast Asian Government Networks"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-31"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "TrueConf" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Axios_supply_chain_attack_chops_away_at_ {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Axios supply chain attack chops away at npm trust"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-31"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_CVE20260596__Command_Injection_in_mlflow {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-0596 - Command Injection in mlflow/mlflow"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-31"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-0596" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Initial_Access_Brokers_have_Shifted_to_H {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Initial Access Brokers have Shifted to High-Value Targets and Premium Pricing"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-31"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-FIN-11" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Operation_TrueChaos_0Day_Exploitation_Ag {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Operation TrueChaos: 0-Day Exploitation Against Southeast Asian Government Targe"
        severity = "critical"

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 500 threat advisories. Of these, 123 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 111 as HIGH risk. 45 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-UNKNOWN, UNC-CDB-99, CDB-APT-22. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.

Deploy auto-generated Sigma/YARA detection rules to SIEM/EDR
